title: WILDFLOWER PLAY COLLECTIVE - 211info
text: WILDFLOWER PLAY COLLECTIVE WILDFLOWER PLAY COLLECTIVE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an indoor playground. Memberships include daily use of the playspace, weekly classes, events, access to the WildFlower Swap Closet, gently used books, toys, clothes, and gear. Donations are accepted. 58751 S Bachelor Flat Road Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Ages 0-6 years old Hours: Saturday-Sunday 7am-7pm Email (503) 664-0669 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 664-0669 Main phone Main phone (503) 664-0669 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Sliding scale fee, member based FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Columbia County Services: Children's Play Groups Parent to Parent Networking Parent/Child Activity Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
